info.title: Party Service
info.description:
Party master data: companies, individuals, contacts, and addresses.

**Authentication:** Bearer JWT. Tenant identity derived from JWT claims (not headers). Permission: `party.mutate` for writes, reads are open to any authenticated caller.

**Multi-tenancy:** All data is scoped by the `app_id` (tenant) in the JWT. No X-Tenant-Id header required.

parameters.name: external_id
parameters.description: Filter by external_id within the system

200.description: Contact set as primary for role

ApiError.description:
Standard API error envelope.

`error` is a machine-readable code (`not_found`, `validation_error`, etc.).
`message` is human-readable.  `request_id` is populated from the tracing
context already present in request extensions.  `details` carries per-field
errors for 422 responses.

DataResponse_Address.description:
Simple wrapper for sub-collection list endpoints that don't need
full pagination (contacts per party, addresses per party, etc.).

DataResponse_Contact.description:
Simple wrapper for sub-collection list endpoints that don't need
full pagination (contacts per party, addresses per party, etc.).

DataResponse_PrimaryContactEntry.description:
Simple wrapper for sub-collection list endpoints that don't need
full pagination (contacts per party, addresses per party, etc.).

PaginatedResponse_Party.description:
Generic paginated response envelope.

Every list endpoint returns this wrapper so consumers get consistent
pagination metadata regardless of the underlying entity type.

items.description: Full party base record as stored and returned.
